# rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm { #skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm }

`rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm`

ECM-based hyperreduction for finite element linear forms.

This module follows the same clustering strategy used by the ECSW linear-form
implementation already in the repository. The only change is that the weights
are stored per element and per Gauss point, and the assembly is performed from
per-Gauss local vectors.

## Assumption {.doc-section .doc-section-assumption}

The stored ECM weights are treated as multiplicative factors applied to
scikit-fem's native per-Gauss contributions ``form(...) * dx``. If an external
ECM code returns *absolute* cubature weights, convert them first using the
helper in ``skrom.rom.ecm.helpers``.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm](#skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm) | Hyperreduced linear form assembled from ECM-selected Gauss points. |

### LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm { #skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm }

```python
rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm(
    form,
    gauss_weight,
    ubasis,
    lob,
    free_dofs=None,
    mean=None,
    nthreads=0,
    dtype=np.float64,
)
```

Hyperreduced linear form assembled from ECM-selected Gauss points.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [assemble_weighted_ecm](#skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.assemble_weighted_ecm) | Assemble the reduced linear form using ECM Gauss-point weights. |
| [extract_element_vectors_qp_rom](#skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.extract_element_vectors_qp_rom) | Extract per-Gauss local element vectors. |

##### assemble_weighted_ecm { #skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.assemble_weighted_ecm }

```python
rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.assemble_weighted_ecm(
    **kwargs,
)
```

Assemble the reduced linear form using ECM Gauss-point weights.

##### extract_element_vectors_qp_rom { #skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.extract_element_vectors_qp_rom }

```python
rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.LinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.extract_element_vectors_qp_rom(
    basis,
    elem_indices=None,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Extract per-Gauss local element vectors.

###### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name              | Type                                 | Description                                                                                                                  |
|-------------------|--------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| element_vectors_q | (ndarray, shape(n_elem, n_loc, n_q)) | Per-element local vectors resolved at Gauss points, already multiplied by ``basis.dx`` but not yet summed over Gauss points. |
